# Baseline reseeded for v0.4 S1 (REQ-V04-001 reject) under principal-go review.
# Prior baseline (902) reseeded to add exported struct field enumeration.
# The ceiling gate records:
#   - exported top-level declarations as pkg#Name
#   - exported methods on exported receiver types as pkg#RecvType.Method
#   - exported fields of exported structs as pkg#Type.Field
#
# S1 reseed: the v0.4 reject use-case adds the reviewed CLI-verb / use-case
# exception symbols (the reject ports, RejectDeps + fields, RejectInput/Result/
# PRState + fields, RepoKind + values, the reject sentinels, NewRequestRejecter,
# mode.CommandRequestReject, audit.EventKindReject). This is a reviewed, non-TUI
# bump; TUI work must never trigger a baseline reseed.
#
# v0.5 S1 reseed (REQ-V05-001, per-line audit-binding verifier) under
# principal-go review: adds exactly the 12 reviewed audit-verification symbols —
# the ErrAuditLogTampered sentinel; the BindingStatus enum type, its String
# method, and its four values (BindingMissing/BindingVerified/
# BindingUnverifiedLegacy/BindingTampered); the additive
# AuditEntryView.BindingStatus field; the AuditVerifier consumer port; and the
# AuditVerifyResult type with its Entries and FullWalk fields. The verifier
# engine itself is adapter-confined (no core symbol). This is a reviewed,
# non-TUI core addition; TUI work must never trigger a baseline reseed.
#
# v0.5 S3 reseed (REQ-V05-003, actor identity) under principal-go review: adds
# exactly the 2 reviewed actor-attribution symbols — the ActorResolver consumer
# port (the interface counts as one symbol; its sole method ResolveActorLabel is
# not separately enumerated) and the additive AuditEntryView.VerifiedSignerID
# field (the anchor-verified signerID threaded core→display; the only permissible
# resolver input). The resolver engine and the byreis-signer footer parse are
# adapter-confined (no core symbol). This is a reviewed, non-TUI core addition;
# TUI work must never trigger a baseline reseed.
#
# v0.6 S3 reseed (Synthetic field split) under principal-go review: adds exactly
# the 1 reviewed symbol AuditEntryView.Synthetic — the additive typed marker for a
# parser-fabricated display row (truncation advisory / malformed-line placeholder),
# distinct from Unknown so an Unknown-but-valid-JSON row stays hash-verified. The
# parse-time setter and isSyntheticRow reader are adapter-confined (no core symbol).
# The S4 staged-set fail-closed change is adapter-internal and adds zero core symbols.
# This is a reviewed, non-TUI core addition; TUI work must never trigger a baseline reseed.
#
# From this point the baseline is FROZEN for TUI work. Any new exported symbol
# from internal/core/** not present here fails the ceiling gate. Escalate to
# principal-go to extend.
#
# Lines beginning with '#' are comments and are ignored by the ceiling test.
# Format: <import-path>#<exported-name>, <pkg#RecvType.Method>, or <pkg#Type.Field>, sorted.
